headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex scale, not P&L impacting) at stake — Waaree Energies commissions 3,000 MW solar module plant, boosting renewable capacity but with limited immediate ESG impact
what_matters: No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is N/A.
No immediate cost of capital impact; green financing potential in future.
BRSR, GRI, TCFD, CDP frameworks relevant but not triggered by this event.
